course: Methods of Social Research · ULAB · Fall 2025
title: Algorithmic News Feeds and Misinformation Susceptibility — Research Proposal
desc: Sequential explanatory mixed-methods proposal submitted for the MOSR midterm. Establishes the theoretical grounding, sampling logic, and instrument design for the ongoing Dhaka study.

title: Literature Review — Platform Studies and Epistemic Equity
desc: Integrative review of the platform studies literature, with a focus on how epistemic equity has been operationalised in Global South contexts.

title: Team Data Decoder — Final Project
desc: Collaborative data-journalism capstone. Team investigation of an open public-data source, producing a reproducible notebook and a publishable feature-length narrative.
